reasoning: Your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance, as highlighted by the 25W drop from your 5-min to 20-min power. This workout, set on the familiar terrain of Emigration Canyon, transitions from Zone 2 to sweet spot intervals to bolster your aerobic base and fatigue resistance. Building stamina here is crucial to supporting your goal to hit an average of 220-235W on the Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 2x20 minutes at 209-223W with 5-minute recovery at 201W in between. Focus on staying controlled yet consistent in your effort, aiming to push the upper end on the second block.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
